chunks.text: Order Sheet HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 2573 of 2022 [ Abdul Rasheed Korai and another v. Province of Sindh & others] Before: Mr. Justice Adnan-ul-Karim Memon Mr. Justice Riazat Ali Sahar Petitioner: Through Mr. Amir Hassan Shaikh, Advocate Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G. Date of Hearing & Decision: 11.11.2025 O R D E R ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J.- The petitioners have filed this Constitutional Petition seeking directions to the respondents to release their salaries from their respective appointment dates in 2012, along with all service benefits, including annual increments and budgetary enhancements. 2. Petitioner No.1 was appointed as Sanitary Worker BPS-1 on 5.4.2012, and Petitioner No.2 as Beldar BPS-2 on 3.5.2012, both were posted at the defunct Taluka Municipal Administration Bulri Shah Karim, Tando Muhammad Khan. Despite regularly performing their duties, they have not received any salaries. 3. The record shows that notices were issued to the official respondents, but they have failed to file their comments. 4. The petition is disposed of with the observation that the competent authority shall verify the claims of the petitioners. If their claims are found to be genuine, their salaries, along with all admissible service benefits, shall be released within two months, subject to their entitlements under the law. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
